word: H305 - אַחֲלַי - ʼachălay - akh-al-ah'ee - O that

sections.paragraph:
Original: אחלי אחלי

Transliteration: 'achălay 'achălêy

Phonetic: akh-al-ah'ee

BDB Definition:

  1. Oh that...!; oh would that!; ah that!

Origin: probably from H253 and a variation of H3863

TWOT entry: 67a

Part(s) of speech: Interjection
